subcodes.first_line: O ye two descendants of His Holiness Abraham, the Glorious! How blessed is your state, that ye have entered the divine gardens [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو سلیل حضرت خلیل جلیل ای خوشا بحالتان که در ریاض الهی داخل شدید و در
subcodes.subjects: @Judaism; the Torah; the Jewish people, @praise and encouragement, @prophecy and fulfillment, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
